Package net.boricj.bft.coff.constants

Enum Class CoffStorageClass

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<CoffStorageClass>
net.boricj.bft.coff.constants.CoffStorageClass
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<CoffStorageClass>, Constable
public enum CoffStorageClass extends Enum<CoffStorageClass>
COFF symbol storage classes.

    • values

    • valueOf

      public static CoffStorageClass valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getValue

      public byte getValue()
      Returns the numeric storage class value.
      Returns:

    • valueFrom

      public static CoffStorageClass valueFrom(byte value)
      Returns the storage class for a numeric value.
      Parameters:
      value - storage class value
      Returns:
      matching storage class
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is not mapped
